name: A-Team Personal Assistant
description: Situation-aware personal assistant with proactive intelligence. Memory-first orchestrator detects situations (running late, meeting starting), checks taught rules, and routes to self-sufficient workers. Multi-channel messaging (SMS, email, WhatsApp) with proactive setup. Features: smart daily briefings, situation-aware messaging with ETA drafting, teach panel UI, integration gateway, and real device data sync.

actor_types.label: Device Owner
actor_types.description: The person whose life this assistant manages

skills.name: PA Orchestrator
skills.description: Situation-aware brain — fuses signals, detects situations, checks taught rules, routes to workers. Handles simple queries and integration setup directly.

skills.name: Life Manager
skills.description: General life assistant — calendar management, contacts, messaging, scheduling. Self-sufficient with all device tools.

skills.name: Memory Keeper
skills.description: Persistent memory — stores and recalls preferences, facts, instructions, and patterns across conversations.

skills.name: Daily Intelligence
skills.description: Proactive daily briefings — analyzes calendar, unread emails/WhatsApp, birthdays, weather, commute. Cross-references preferences and rules.

skills.name: Messaging Agent
skills.description: Multi-channel communication specialist — drafts and sends messages via SMS, email, and WhatsApp. Proactively detects when a channel isn't connected and guides setup inline.

skills.name: Notification Triage
skills.description: Notification analyst — triages device notifications, unread emails, and WhatsApp messages. Cross-references contacts for VIP identification, manages DND, suppresses noise.

skills.name: TeachThis
skills.description: Teachability engine — interprets natural language instructions, corrections, and demonstrations into structured automation rules. Creates rules that the orchestrator matches before routing.

grants.description: Proves the caller passed voice verification (DOB security question). Required before accessing personal memory or daily intelligence.

handoffs.trigger: User needs general life management: messaging ('tell Sarah...', 'send a message to...'), scheduling ('schedule a meeting...', 'create an event...'), contact lookup, or complex calendar questions.
User wants to store, recall, update, or delete memories. Triggered by: 'remember...', 'don't ever...', 'I prefer...', 'what did I tell you about...', 'my preferences', 'forget that...'
User wants a daily briefing or schedule analysis. Triggered by: 'morning briefing', 'how is my day', 'what should I know today', 'daily summary', 'analyze my schedule'

User wants to send a message, text, email, or WhatsApp someone. Triggered by: 'tell Sarah...', 'send a message to...', 'text Mom...', 'email Mark...', 'WhatsApp David...', 'message...', 'draft a reply to...'

User wants to check notifications, see what they missed, or manage DND. Triggered by: 'check my notifications', 'what did I miss', 'any important messages?', 'turn on DND', 'do not disturb', 'silence notifications'

User wants to teach the PA a behavior, create an automation rule, manage existing rules, or correct a previous suggestion. Triggered by: 'when X do Y', 'teach that', 'next time do this', 'learn this', 'show my rules', 'what rules do I have', 'disable that rule', 'never do that again', 'always do this when...'

voice.description: Voice interactions start at the orchestrator for situation detection and routing

chat.description: Chat/web/mobile interactions start at the orchestrator

api.description: API/web interactions start at the orchestrator

platform_connectors.description: Platform device data connector — calendar, contacts, location, messaging, weather, commute, notifications, DND, battery, connectivity, integration registry, schedule UI. Reads real device data from cloud relay (pushed by ateam-mobile's device-bridge).
Gmail connector — OAuth2 setup via chat, read/send/reply/search emails. Tokens stored in cloud relay.
WhatsApp connector — Baileys-based, QR code auth. Send/receive/search WhatsApp messages.

solution_connectors.description: Dual-store + rule engine — long-term memory (preferences, facts, rules) + ephemeral context (situations, plans) + rule matching + teach panel UI
Solution-owned UI connector — serves PA dashboard and schedule panel as dynamically loaded plugins

security_contracts.name: Life manager requires verified user
security_contracts.validation: User must be verified before accessing life management tools

security_contracts.name: Memory access requires verified user
security_contracts.validation: User must be verified before accessing persistent memory

security_contracts.name: Daily intelligence requires verified user
security_contracts.validation: User must be verified before generating daily briefings

security_contracts.name: Messaging requires verified user
security_contracts.validation: User must be verified before sending messages

security_contracts.name: Notification triage requires verified user
security_contracts.validation: User must be verified before accessing notifications

security_contracts.name: Teachability requires verified user
security_contracts.validation: User must be verified before teaching rules or managing automations

voice.welcome: Hey! It's A-Team. What can I help you with?

prompt.behaviorRules:
You are A-Team, a situation-aware personal assistant. Your brain is the PA Orchestrator.

ROUTING — the orchestrator handles all routing. Send every user message to the orchestrator via send_message_to_skill targeting 'pa-orchestrator'. The orchestrator will:
1. Assess the situation (calendar + location + time + weather)
2. Check taught rules in memory
3. Either answer directly or route to the right worker skill

Do NOT try to route to individual skills yourself — the orchestrator decides.
prompt.informationGathering: Confirm message content before sending. Confirm scheduling details.

securityQuestion.question: What is your date of birth?
